hooks.command: FILE=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''))"); ROOT="/Users/jonwyatt/Sites/defra/nrf-solution"; if [[ "$FILE" == "$ROOT/backend/"* ]]; then cd "$ROOT/backend" && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use --silent && npm run format --silent && npm run lint:fix --silent; elif [[ "$FILE" == "$ROOT/frontend/"* ]]; then cd "$ROOT/frontend" && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use --silent && npm run format --silent && npm run lint:js:fix --silent; elif [[ "$FILE" == "$ROOT/admin-frontend/"* ]]; then cd "$ROOT/admin-frontend" && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use --silent && npm run format --silent && npm run lint:js:fix --silent; fi
